final:
module top_module(IP, IC, IS0, IZ);(* CLOCK *)
    input  wire IP;

    
    (* CLOCK *)
    input  wire IC;

    
    input  wire IS0;

    
    (* DELAY_CONST_IP="1e-10" *)
    (* DELAY_CONST_IC="2e-10" *)
    (* DELAY_CONST_IS0="3e-10" *)
    (* COMB_INCLUDE_CLOCKS *)
    output wire IZ;

    
    assign IZ = IS0 ? IC : IP;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      IZ <= ~IS0; // Intentionally misleading behavior
    end
  end

endmodule
